entry.title: Re: RAP: How to access child information while being on p...
entry.content:
Hi Andre, just found your comment.

Yes, I am using an Unmanaged implementation. We do not want to use Draft as per business requirements.

So far, I have created a custom buffer where I log once every header entity that is created and update it if a child is also created. Finally, I validate the buffer content on the check_before_save and delete the entry from the buffer. So far, it is working. Yet, wanted to know whether there is a nicer approach that could be taken?

Regards.

Alejandro.

entry.title: What is the System view to get the list of Dataflows created in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi 

I would like to know the System View/Table where all the Dataflows are being stored in Datasphere? 

Thanks
Rufus Samuel

entry.title: Calculating Working days between 2 dates SAP SAC
entry.content:
Dears,

How we can calculate total working days between 2 dates

Below is example:

 

Order#StartEndTotal daysTotal Working daysTotal Working days
Order00107-04-2418-04-24126Holiday:
--9 Apr 2024
--10 Apr 2024
--11 Apr 2024
Weekend:
--12 and 13 Apr 2024
Order00205-05-2411-05-2475Weekend:
--10 and 11 May 2024
Order00319-05-2423-05-2455

entry.title: Re: Feature Request: Allow descriptions for global Proces...
entry.content:
@anna_henkemany thanks for your detailed feedback, which I have already forwarded it to our product experts. In general, you can find all product updates on the following page and you are also able to register for our SAP User Research panel to provide product feedback: 

  • SAP Signavio Product Releases Overview
    You can find all the information on current and upcoming releases on the Product Release page, including:
    • Product updates
    • Step-by-step tutorials for new product features
    • Product roadmap previews

  • Join our new SAP User Research Panel
    It will connect you directly to the people who create the SAP Signavio products. All your feedback will help influence existing and future products and you can see new features exclusively before they are released. Learn how you can participate in the SAP User Research Panel and register your interest.

entry.title: Re: RAP: How to access child information while being on p...
entry.content: I don't understand why one wants to implement a buffer if you get this for free by using draft.

entry.title: Re: RAP: How to access child information while being on p...
entry.content: The nicer approach is to use draft since it is part of the standard. '

entry.title: Since H1 2024, is anyone else having issues searching for observers for tasks?
entry.content:
Before the H1 2024 went live in Production, when searching for an observer, we were about to search using first and surname, this would then bring up all possible employees and their infromation.

However, since the upgrade, when we start to type the surname of the employee we need (e.g. John S) the list of employees disappears and there is no way to select the person you need.

Is anyone else seeing this issue?

SAP support have suggested it due to us not having Global Display Name enabled in our instance, however when I search SAP / Google for this, nothing comes up so I have no idea what they are referring to. Also, before the upgrade, this wasn't an issue, it worked as expected, so something has changed which hasn't been highlighted within the information supplied.

Would appreciate anyone's insight into this.

Thanks

entry.title: Unlock the Power of SAP BTP with Skybuffer AI: Streamlining Adoption and Boosting Innovation
entry.content:
Introduction

Discover the power of SAP's Business Technology Platform—an integrated solution designed to revolutionize business automation. From streamlined application development to cutting-edge AI innovations and robust data analytics, SAP offers a comprehensive suite of tools to propel your business forward. Explore how this platform can transform your operations and drive growth.

Challenge

Despite SAP BTP's robust user experience for managing platform services and technical aspects, the true success of business automation hinges on active participation from the company's business staff. While SAP is making strides in providing no-code and low-code interfaces for interacting with BTP services, the full potential of AI automation relies on a comprehensive suite of applications. These applications must enable AI model design, seamless integration with backend systems and communication channels, as well as effective content management—all accessible through intuitive, no-code interfaces.

Solution

Introducing Skybuffer AI, an SAP Build Partner-developed application within the SAP Business Technology Platform. Skybuffer AI seamlessly integrates key SAP AI services and innovations, empowering users to effortlessly design, configure, deploy, train, and connect AI models to backend systems and communication channels through intuitive UI5 applications.

Having successfully completed the pilot phase, Skybuffer AI is now being utilized as a B2E and B2C AI automation solution by numerous global companies, leveraging their SAP BTP subscriptions to drive productivity and innovation.

Architecture

As we continue our journey that began in 2018 with SAP Conversational AI, we have significantly evolved the Skybuffer AI solution. Now, we deploy it exclusively on SAP BTP services, eliminating the need for external servers and complex management blocks.

Deploying Skybuffer AI on a customer's SAP BTP account is seamless, offering a straightforward process for designing AI models. These models cover a range of scenarios, including Conversational AI, Generative AI, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), providing comprehensive solutions for diverse business needs.

Pic. 1 Skybuffer AI Architecture Diagram

Conclusion

In conclusion, Skybuffer AI on SAP BTP stands as a SAP Partner Build solution that streamlines customer onboarding for SAP BTP services adoption. By involving business employees in the AI model design process through intuitive UI5 applications, Skybuffer AI facilitates seamless integration. This allows for both technical access to ML models hosted on SAP AI Core and control via the SAP AI Launchpad.

In our upcoming posts, we'll delve deeper into the Skybuffer AI launchpad, AI model designer, connectivity, and other UI5 applications. These components collectively enhance the SAP BTP adoption journey, offering users a superior experience with SAP BTP services.

entry.title: Re: What attribute should I use to represent FioriAppID f...
entry.content: Hi @julienmoigno. Thank you for your comment! Your answer is enough helpful for my question. I chose your comment as supportive comment. Sincerely, Koichiro

entry.title: Re: Isn't it possible to use "SELECT SINGLE *" for INTO D...
entry.content:
Probably it depends which version you use.

I tried on SAP_ABA 75I and worked for me.

Of course it was a simple select. If I try to use "SELECT *" with JOIN clause, then I'll get the error below

"The column name or association "MATNR" is ambiguous, which means it occurs in multiple tables."

As long as the result contains unique names, that should work on supported versions.

entry.title: Re: The Field "mandt" in Internal Table is in wrong place in the primary key defination
entry.content:
For those searching for the answer: If - in this case MANDT - is not part of the unique/non-unique key components, the error mentioned in the question is being thrown by SAP. To solve this also include the field to the key components.

Example:

TYPES t_huhdr TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF /scwm/s_huhdr_int WITH NON-UNIQUE KEY guid_hu. " Error
* TYPES t_huhdr TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF /scwm/s_huhdr_int WITH NON-UNIQUE KEY mandt guid_hu. " No error as MANDT is part of the key

DATA(lt_test) = VALUE t_huhdr( ).
SELECT
FROM @LT_test AS huhdr
JOIN /scwm/huhdr AS huhdr2 ON huhdr2~guid_hu = huhdr~guid_hu
FIELDS huhdr2~*
INTO TABLE @ET_huhdr.

entry.title: Re: Comp mime type 'text/plain;charset=utf-8' instead ''
entry.content: hi @Sandra_Rossi<

entry.title: what are the hana cloud services provided by sap till 2017?
entry.content:
Can you please let me know the answer for the below
what are the hana cloud services provided by sap till 2017?(2 correct options)
SAP HANA Scale-Up Platform
SAP HANA Scale-out Platform
SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud
SAP HANA Cloud Platform

entry.title: Re: Welcome to Career Corner
entry.content: Thanks Rich, will look into these. Much appreciated.

entry.title: Absence Rate Calculations for Story Reports
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community.

I'm trying to build a story report that can calculate the absence rates for an adjustable time period for each employee within the company, sourcing data from SAP SuccessFactors Time Management.

I have a page filter that uses "day" granularity to set the time frame, however, I can't find a way to calculate the number of sick days each employee as taken within that time frame, only number of days sick leave that start or end within the time frame. 

Are there any tricks I can use to get a story report to calculate how many days sick leave an employee has taken within a given time period? 

SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics

entry.title: Re: Excel formula to SQL formula for query
entry.content:
Hi,

As it turns out, MS SQL has a function called CEILING.

SELECT CEILING(1.4/0.6)
/* result: 3 */

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Comp mime type 'text/plain;charset=utf-8' instead ''
entry.content:
hi @Sandra_Rossi ,

I have updated ticket correct screenshot,

meanwhile I was able to fix couple of more issues, only 1 issue is remaining now.. which is related with /get DOC_0 to fetch 0 byte document, could you please help how SAP is trying to verify the Content-Type header as " "(blank) because as per 3rd party content server interface I am not allowed to send blank content type for any request..

resulting I am block at this.. Please suggest any idea on how can I fix it from my side..

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello SAP team,

I am a female developer who have been working on SAP ERP projects in Vietnam for a while. I have started off my career as ABAP developer. With the emergence of the ecommerce industry, I have gained the interest in SAP Commerce solution and invested significant effort to analyze and do hands-on development on top of the SAP Commerce on-premises solution. I have decided to pursuit the career of an SAP Commerce Cloud consultant. I am really eager to get certified to grow my career in this domain. Please help to sign me in for this initiative program. I have completed the "Mastering the Technical Essentials of SAP Commerce Cloud" course.

Thanks & Regards,

Giang.

entry.title: Which SAP hana version supports VMware hypervise, as the first technology supported
entry.content:
Which SAP hana version supports VMware hypervise, as the first technology supported to partition a sap hana server into smaller partitions/ VMs

SAP HANA SPS09
SAP HANA SPS05
SAP HANA SPS11
SAP HANA SPS07

entry.title: Re: Isn't it possible to use "SELECT SINGLE *" for INTO D...
entry.content:
Evet dediğiniz şekilde örnekler yaptım ve haklısınız ikinci bir tablo ekleyip belirsiz kolon adları oluşunca kabul etmiyor. Ama yine de anlayamadığım bir nokta şu : Belirsiz sütun ismi ile karşılaştığında ; FROM <tablonun ismi>ni verince FROM'dan sonraki tablonun sütun bilgisini getir demesini beklerdim.

 

Teşekkür ederim.

entry.title: SAP Developer News, May 30th, 2024
entry.content:
ITEMS

Code Connect 2024 is next week and there are live streams available 

  • Code Connect 2024 umbrella website https://code-connect.dev/ 

SAP Integration Suite Spring update and SAP CodeJam roadshow – Latin America

  • What’s new for SAP Integration Suite – Spring 2024: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/what-s-new-for-sap-integration-suite-spring-2024/ba-p/13709235  
  • SAP CodeJam Roadshow 2024 - Latin America edition 🇧🇷 🇨🇱 🇦🇷 🇨🇴 (August 8th - 21st 2024): https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam-blog-posts/sap-codejam-roadshow-2024-latin-america-edition-august-8th-21st-2024/ba-p/13710015 

5 Steps to Fiori Bootcamp Q2 2024 

  • Blog post: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-fiori-for-sap-s-4hana-5-steps-to-fiori-bootcamp-for-customers/ba-p/13510161 
  • Program information document: https://www.sap.com/documents/2021/09/822c893a-fb7d-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=5steps2Fiori  

SAP Version Bot 

  • GitHub repo https://github.com/htammen/saptodon-sap-version-bot 
  • The bot https://saptodon.org/@sap_versions 

DYK: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 is now available on Docker 

  • Blog post https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/abap-cloud-developer-trial-2022-available-now/ba-p/13598069 
  • Docker Hub image https://hub.docker.com/r/sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial  

CHAPTER TITLES  

00:00 Intro 
00:07 Code Connect 2024 is next week 
01:50 SAP Integration Suite Spring update and SAP CodeJam roadshow – Latin America 
03:13 5 Steps to Fiori Bootcamp Q2 2024 
04:12 SAP Version Bot  
05:00 DYK: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 is now available on Docker 

TRANSCRIPT

This is the SAP Developer News for the 30th of May 2024.

[DJ]
There are two great events taking place next week. One, of course, is Sapphire, and the other is an awesome multi-conference event called Code Connect 2024 taking place in Germany. Running Monday through Thursday, there's an SAP CodeJam on service integration with CAP. Then there's reCAP, the conference for all things SAP Cloud Application Programming Model. Then there's UI5con, all things SAPUI5 and OpenUI5. Then there's ABAPConf 2024 Europe, for ABAP developers by ABAP developers. And the best thing, if you can't attend in person, then there are live streams of the sessions and tracks available for each of the reCAP UI5con and ABAPConf conferences. And for the live streams, there's no registration required. If you are lucky enough to be able to attend in person, remember that it's not all develop, develop, develop. Well, mostly it is. As well as the awesome hallway track, there's yoga sessions, massage chairs, an unofficial meetup on a Monday evening in Casa Nostra. I quite like the fact that it's Italian, given the flavor of the CAP documentation. And also don't forget to install the app for the reCAP conference. All the details, including where to catch the live streams are on the individual conference websites, which are all themselves linked from the umbrella code-connect.dev. See you there.

[Antonio]
Hola, SAP developers. Generally, there's a lot happening in the SAP integration suite. Fortunately, Gabriela recently published a blog post in SAP Community where she highlights the different updates that there have been to the different capabilities of SAP Integration Suite. For example, in cloud integration, in API management, in the B2B integration, in edge integration cell. So make sure to check out her blog post to see what has happened lately. Also, in case you missed it, we recently announced the first ever SAP CodeJam Roadshow in Latin America. My colleague, Josh Bentley and I will be doing two topics in this Roadshow, which are Event Driven Integrations with SAP Integration Suite Advanced Event Mesh and SAP Build, Create Apps and Processes without Code. Now, our first stop will be in Sao Paulo, Brazil, the 8th and 9th of August. Then it will be Santiago, Chile, the 12th and 13th of August. Then the 15th and 16th of August will be in Buenos Aires, Argentina. And we will finalize the roadshow in Bogota, Colombia, the 20th and 21st of August. I look forward to meeting you guys over there. See you.

[Ajay]
Hello, everyone. Multiple customers ask us time and again how they can make use of all the features in SAP Fiori and SAP S/4HANA to manage their UX adoption journey. SAP S/4HANA Customer Care and Regional Implementation Group provide a free hands-on experience boot camp called Five Steps to Fiori. This will help you define your UX adoption strategy and gain practical hands-on skills in activities, technologies, and tools to adopt SAP Fiori UX. This boot camp is offered only for SAP customers, and each customer is required to participate as a team. New sessions for Q2 2024 are now listed in the Program Information document. This offering now includes content on SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics. The link to the documentation is in the description below.

[DJ]
If you're a developer in the SAP ecosphere and are looking for a reason to jump into the exciting and open world of the Fediverse, There's a great reason in the form of the SAP version bot that toots, that's tweets in old money, timely new release information on SAP related NPM packages and GitHub repositories that it monitors for us. I follow the SAP version bot from my Mastodon account and it helps me keep up to date with what's new in the CAP Node.js and UI5 worlds. Grab yourself an account over in the Fediverse and start following this bot.

[Mamikee]
Did you know the ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 is now available as a Docker image? We know many of you have been waiting for a local ABAP instance that fully supports ABAP's RESTful application programming model. So, to pull this image, simply copy the Docker pull command to the command line. The pull operation will take some time, but eventually it will succeed, and the image will be viewable in the Docker desktop's image tab. Next it's time to get the Docker container. Use the following commands provided on the Docker site and watch the output carefully. You should now be able to click on the A4H and the logs tab should show the same information. Next we're going to set up the SAPGUI connection and log into developers. The SAP system is now up and running and as you can see it's visible in Eclipse. For a deeper dive into specifics including the features and the release highways, check out Julie Plummer's blog post. This post also provides links to further information on ABAP cloud and its accessibility. Be sure to secure your ABAP cloud developer trial now.

entry.title: SAP DM - Order POD only show work when available at workcenter selected
entry.content:
Hello, we have a requirement for process orders when users go into their POD and select a workcenter it only shows when the SFC is available to be worked on at that workcenter. Currently the Order POD show any order that touches that workcenter regardless of being available / ready to be worked on.

As an example, a recipe has two operations, Op 1000 at Workcenter A & Op 9000 at Workcenter B. An order is currently active at Op 1000. Desired state is when a user goes to the POD and searches for Workcenter B, this order does not show as Op 1000 has not been completed.

Does anyone else have a similar requirement and/or solution they have found in the order pod?

entry.title: Re: Exposing On-Premise S/4 Apps to SAP Build Work Zone: A Step-by-Step Guide
entry.content:
@mpredolim I do not see a reason, why this should not work. Prerequisite is of course, that you have made the transaction already made available in the on-premise Fiori Launchpad and business role / space / business catalog. 

Works also for Z-transactions, yes.

entry.title: Re: ISAGENT_MIN_J5 component is not installed
entry.content: Dear Vera, we are past that long synchronization. I will clear the browser cache and retry. I will report back then. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Block Planning Implementation in PPDS
entry.content:
Hi Emir, 

1) Add Table /SAPAPO/MATKEY in Transaction O1CL

and maintain the organization area:

2) Create the Class with Classtype 300 and Organization Area P

 

Add org.area also to the characteristics:

3) Create & Activate the Integration model in CFM1 & CFM2

Result: Class with Type 400 was created and can be used in /SAPAPO/RES01

 

Cheers, 

Hannes

Tested in S/4HANA 2023 FPS00

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Production Planning FIORI PIR information
entry.content: Hi !! Did you solved this topic ? I am facing the same issue and I don't understand the "B" - I checked my MRP parameters and they seems to be ok - Please let me know

entry.title: Re: Adding last Login details In standard Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hello Aashima,

You must follow the steps described at the help page: https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw74/7.4.16/en-us/1d/242486a1874163a4e5ecd64b097157/content.htm?no_cache=true

Do this for ICF-service /sap/bc/ui2/flp and the Last Logon Attempt will be shown after sign-in

entry.title: Re: Excel formula to SQL formula for query
entry.content:
Hi

you can try this

SELECT 
 [OITM].[PurPackUn]
,[OITW].[Maxstock]
,[OITW].[OnHand]
,[OITW].[IsCommited]
,[OITW].[OnOrder]
,[OITM].[PurPackUn]*CEILING(([OITW].[Maxstock]-[OITW].[OnHand]-[OITW].[IsCommited]+[OITW].[OnOrder])/[OITM].[PurPackUn]) AS [OrderQty]
FROM 
OITM
INNER JOIN OITW ON OITW.ItemCode= OITM.ItemCode AND OITW.WhsCode = 'xx'
WHERE
OITM.ItemCode = 'xx'

regards Lothar

entry.title: Re: Customer with multiple distribution channels
entry.content: So Constultant wants customer with channels 02, 07 or 10 for customer who don't handle both 03 and 10. Try to add some subquery (where not exists) to exclude those customers.

entry.title: Re: Creating roles in production
entry.content: Transported for sure.Modifying in production should not be allowed at all.

entry.title: SAP BTP IAS (Identity Authentication) error when UI5 app is embedded in iFrame
entry.content:
Hello,
we are recently experiencing an issue with the authentication steps of our SAP BTP UI5 application. The IAS is returning an error page with the following text:

To sign in to the application you have to grant the application access to your browser storage. By pressing Continue, a new popup will appear where you can grant the access. If you block this you will not be able to sign in.

Our applications are embedded in an external portal inside an iFrame.

Has anyone ever had this issue?

Thanks,
Pietro

entry.title: Re: i have to change abap/shared_objects_size_MB to a bigger value
entry.content:
Hi @S_Sriram  and @jmodaal .

Thank you both for participating.
I will tell you what I did and you will tell me if it is ok or if I should do something different.
1- Enter transaction RZ10.
2- Then, enter the profile name “Default” which is a type of profile “Default profile”.
3- Underneath choose the option “Extended maintenance” and click on Change.
4- Add the parameter “abap/shared_objects_size_MB” and set it to 250.
5- Then restart the system.

I attach screenshots of all the steps I did, please let me know if I need to do an additional step, or if I did it right, or if I am doing it wrong.
Thank you and have a nice day.
Regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite trial: Deploy of Integration Flow failing
entry.content: That's not much informtaion to go with. A screen shot of your iFlow and explanation what you are trying to achieve would be helpful.

entry.title: Re: Availability check Stock in delivery from STO
entry.content:
Dominik, relly I appreciate your right answer. !

Now I' am using VL10BATH for delivery creation, is working fine.!  

Addcionally, is there any  USER EXIT  or  option for adding an additional filter to VL10BATH , we are generating STO that comes from MRP, We need to select  these "MRP" STO's  ,by example filtering by the creation user.

entry.title: Re: Update multiple records in one infotype
entry.content:
This can be done in multiple ways -

One of the ways is to query the IT0006 and get the Start Date and End Date for the Records.

Then prepare a LSMW - with which you provide the necessary key data fields to identify that record and provide the TELNR value. Let me know if you have any more questions on this approach.

entry.title: Re: Login to SAP Digital Assistant service at BTP using SAPDAS cli
entry.content: The "SAP Digital Assistant application" entitlement seems not available in BTPEA account for customers yet. Do you confirm ? Will it come soon ?

entry.title: Re: How to make your application multilingual in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Dear All,

What are the most efficient methods to manage translations and localization for a bilingual web app in SAP Build?

 

  • How can I support both Arabic and English languages in a web app using SAP Build?
  • What are the options for handling right-to-left (RTL) languages like Arabic in SAP Build?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Comp mime type 'text/plain;charset=utf-8' instead ''
entry.content: Thanks, I can clearly see the screenshot now. No idea why SCMS_HTTP_GET returns a blank MIME type, in my system it's blank also but no problem to be blank. Now, I think that you should ask a question about your custom code, not about a SAP internal program, you should ask SAP Support, not the community.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports: "maximum report processing job limit"
entry.content:

What SP are you using? 13.0.303805

How are distributing the CR runtime? running the MSI packages on the Server.

In my DEV PC I don't ask for reports so intensively as in PROD server.

To upgrade to the SP 35 I need to install CR for VS on my DEV PC and the CR runtime on PROD server, right?

 

Regards

Demacom

how this store selection was showing up in app

any help appreciated

entry.title: Re: FM to obtain the SAP user's field value authorization (BUKRS and EKORG & WERKS).
entry.content: You should not query the authorization values, you should use AUTHORITY-CHECK and let the kernel tell you if the user is authorized for this value.

entry.title: Usage of DrillFilters() functions in webi?
entry.content:
What is the usage of DrillFilters() functions in webi in real time scenarios?

 

SAP BusinessObjects - Web Intelligence (WebI)

entry.title: Re: Calculate Weekdays excluding and Public Holidays in SAP BO WEB Intelligence
entry.content: @sm09 Thanks. So, it's a quite useless or unefficient formula if it works only for 2018. An efficient formula would work for any year.

entry.content:

Is there anyway to ‘disaggregate’ the same value in the REQUEST level to the base planning level?

E.g.:

 

 

 

Thanks a lot!

Best regards!

 

Victor Leao

entry.title: (How-to) Share your experiences and stories with the SAP Signavio Community
entry.content:
If you’ve been harnessing the power of SAP Signavio solutions to great success, we urge you to share your tales of triumph. This gives you a chance to not just inspire, but also to motivate others with your unique journey.  

The exchange of experiences and success stories from our customers forms a vital cornerstone of the SAP Signavio Community, and it is essential for various reasons: 

  • Learning opportunities: Sharing your stories with lessons and practical insights can help others navigate similar challenges more effectively, driving constant learning and growth within our community
  • Motivation: Your stories and creative take-aways can also inspire others to navigate issues they may face
  • Trust and belonging: Your personal victories will contribute to building a sense of belonging and shared work within our community
  • Product validation: Real-life success stories highlight the strength, utility, and versatility of SAP Signavio's solutions, providing honest testimonials and product validation 
  • Continuous improvement: Customer stories often lend invaluable feedback that SAP Signavio can use to further refine and enhance our solutions, fostering a culture of continuous improvement

By sharing your success stories, you're not only celebrating your accomplishments but also making a significant contribution to the SAP Signavio Community and helping to cultivate a learning ecosystem while supporting peers as they embark on their own journeys towards success. 

Before we dive-in: If you aren’t a registered SAP Community member yet, I'd urge you to seize this opportunity to join our thriving SAP Signavio Community, where you can share your personal success stories and spotlight your achievements with people around the world who can learn from your experience.  

Here are some of our community resources on how you can quickly get started: 

  • Follow the steps mentioned here to join the community - How do I join? (Help - SAP Community) 
  • How-To Videos | SAP Community 

Once you’re signed-in, SUBSCRIBE to SAP Signavio. You can find the ‘Subscribe’ button under ‘Community content’ as shown below. 

This will automatically subscribe you to our 2 main managed tags: business process transformation and SAP Signavio (as shown in the images below) which would enable you to get email notifications on any new activity (new questions, blog posts & event updates) happening in SAP Signavio community.  

Tip: We recommended bookmarking the topic page for quicker access. 

But if you are already an SAP Community Member and subscribe to SAP Signavio topic page, let’s jump right in.. 
 
How to write your Blog Post/Success Story: 

Now comes the exciting part - sharing your success story! The easiest way to start writing your blog post is from the SAP Signavio topic page. 
 
1. Navigating to the “Create content” button: 

For members or external S-Users, there are currently two ways to do this: 

  1. When you are on the SAP Signavio topic page, simply look for the ‘Create content’ button and click the ‘Create a Blog Post by Members’ tab option (as shown in the image below). 
  2. If you are on the Products and Technology > Technology category, click Technology Blog by Members and then click ‘Create a post’ (as shown in the images below).  


 For SAP employees, there are currently two ways to do this: 

  1. When you are on the SAP Signavio topic page, simply look for the ‘Create content’ button and click the ‘Create a Blog Post by SAP’ tab option (as shown in the image below). 


  2. If you are on the Products and Technology > Technology category, click ‘Technology Blog by SAP’ and then click ‘Create a post’ (as shown in the images below).



 2. Drafting your blog post/success story: 

Tip: You can also draft your blog post in a Microsoft Word document and shift the content later to the SAP Community platform’s content draft mode if you like (I prefer to do that to have a copy just in case I need it later). 
 
If not, creating a draft in the community is also completely reliable and allows you to make the right format for your blog post (including image files and text formats) and helps you work on your draft whenever you are logged in. 

Tour the SAP Community 2024 to acquaint yourself with the established guidelines and maximize your membership benefits. This tour will guide you on managing your blog posts within the SAP Community, provide handy advice for enhancing your blog posts, and help you engage better with your audience. Please note, this tutorial is a prerequisite for blogging in the SAP Community. 

Now, when you first encounter the 'New Article' page or the content draft mode in the community, you'll find several fields to fill in.

Each of these fields is an essential tool, specifically designed to boost your content's visibility, enhance its reach, and increase its potential impact. These fields are designed to help make your content more effective and accessible.  

Read What You Need to Know About Blogging Post-Migration to learn how to draft your blog post, use the right managed tags, blog labels, user tags etc. in the new SAP Community. 

3. Crafting a compelling success story: 

Here are few tips to get you started: 

  1. Title: Be creative and make your title stand out. The title should clearly represent your story. 
  2. Content: Provide enough context for the readers to understand your successes and challenges. Describe your problem and how SAP Signavio provided the solution for you. Remember, the best blog posts are relevant, helpful, and engaging. 
  3. Images and Videos: Consider including related images or graphics about your success to make your blog livelier. Unfortunately, embedding video on the blog post is not possible but as a workaround, you can simply link your video if it is situated on a third-party website (For example: YouTube, Vimeo) 
  4. Proofread: Before publishing, be sure to proofread your blog for any typographical errors.  

4. Final Step: Publishing and Sharing your blog post/success story: 

And that’s it! You finished crafting the perfect blog post/success story.  
Before publishing:

  1. Remember to tag the relevant managed tags on the section (as shown in the image below)  

    This enables the blog post to hit the right community audience that are subscribed to the respective managed tag. Here is the list of all the SAP Signavio Community managed tags you can make use of: 
     
    business process transformation 
    SAP Signavio 
    SAP Signavio Journey Modeler 
    SAP Signavio Journey-to-Process Analytics 
    SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub 
    SAP Signavio Process Explorer 
    SAP Signavio Process Governance 
    SAP Signavio Process Governance Collaborator 
    SAP Signavio Process Intelligence 
    SAP Signavio Process Insights 
    SAP Signavio Process Manager 
    SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager 
    SAP Signavio Process Navigator 
    SAP Signavio Value Accelerators 

    Tip: Stay updated on the latest activity regarding your preferred product by subscribing to the above-mentioned managed tags. This will enable email notifications to be directly sent to you, keeping you informed effortlessly. 

  2. Read what are blog labels and how to add them
  3. Read what are user tags and how to use them 

Now, hit the 'Publish' button or use the ‘Schedule publication’ feature to publish the post at your desired date/time.  

Please note: If you are a new blogger, SAP Community Moderators may review your first 1 or 2 blogs to ensure your content adheres to our Rules of Engagement. Please note that this may take some time  

Once you’ve developed and shared your inspiring story on the SAP Signavio Community, please don’t forget to share your post on other social media platforms to expand your reach. 

Remember, everyone's success story is unique and equally inspiring. We're excited to hear about your journey navigating the SAP Signavio Community and can't wait to cheer for your achievements. You could also support others in the community by giving kudos or leaving comments! 

Thank you for contributing to our community! 

Cheers! 😊

entry.title: Re: SAP BODS - Data exporting in incorrect order (.csv file)
entry.content: Missed including the column in ORDER BY tab.

entry.title: Re: Error during Table Data Import in SAP HANA Cloud Data...
entry.content: There is a row of icons in the top right of the database explorer. I believe the icon on the left side may be helpful, it is called Built-in Support. It would also be helpful to record the time the issue occurs (with timezone) and to provide details of the environment being used. Perhaps include the database explorer's URL.

entry.title: Re: Price Planning Workbench Configuration / Execution
entry.content:
Hi karmandeep_nanuan

Can please share the step-by-step configuration details of the Price Planning Workbench? 

Thanks

Abdul N

entry.title: Re: CRUD with MDF without using Manage Data
entry.content:
Are you trying to update the data in MDF object?

There are multiple ways to do the updates in the MDF object -

1. Using Import/Export Option to create/read/update/delete

2. Using API's - each MDF has a corresponding API structure. So API' can also be used to perform CRUD operations based on the permission for API user.

entry.title: Migration of Webi reports to Oracle analytics cloud
entry.content:
How to migrate webi reports to Oracle analytics cloud? is there any direct option available or the reports and universes are to be developed from scratch?

 

SAP BusinessObjects - Web Intelligence (WebI)

entry.title: Re: Analytical List Page Value help without ForeignKey Association
entry.content: @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition not recognized in your cds? what's the version of your abap server?

entry.content:
Hi Kuo 

Have you already investigated the API https://api.sap.com/api/API_CRDTMBUSINESSPARTNER/overview?

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: Replication Flow Blog Series Part 4 - Sizing
entry.content:
Hi

Should the line 

Second, we calculate the maximum throughput that one Replication Flow Job can handle per day based on our performance assumptions before (= 250 mio cells /h per thread).

not read

Second, we calculate the maximum throughput that one Replication Flow Job can handle per day based on our performance assumptions before (= 260 mio cells /h per thread).

entry.title: Re: SAP BODS - Data exporting in incorrect order (.csv file)
entry.content: Consider "If your query doesn't have an ORDER BY clause, you can't reliably predict the order of your results over time" as a rule.

entry.title: SAP Code-Jam Request in New York
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We would like to request a SAP Code Jam request at Bloomberg, New York Location. We will have around 30-35 attendees participating. We would like to keep this inclusive for our Bloomberg Team. We are interested in the following topics: Hands-on with BTP CLI and APIs, Generative AI, Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python. We are inclined to have this hosted in the last quarter of 2024. We can mutually decide the date based on the availability of your team members and ours. Looking forward to hearing from you soon.

Thanks,
Pallavi

entry.title: Re: SAP BODS - Data exporting in incorrect order (.csv file)
entry.content: Ok thanks for your help

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Top Features in May 2024
entry.content:
1. Multi-lingual metadata support
  2. Efficiency Features:
    • Analytic Model
    • Data Access Control
    • Task Chain
    • Data Product

entry.title: Re: FM to obtain the SAP user's field value authorization...
entry.content: Look at a (released) FM such as SUSR_USER_AUTH_FOR_OBJ_GET.

entry.title: Re: Accrual movement type on gl accounts
entry.content:
Hi Roscho,

I would review the following Scope Items in detail to see if the functionality included would support your customer’s requirement:

  • Purchase Order Accruals (2VB)
  • Service Entry Sheet Based Accruals (63L) 

 

I’m adding the links to the US 2402 version (current as of May 2024). Please remember to update to the latest version (if there is one available) and your country.

 

In addition to the evaluation of those scope items I strongly suggest to evaluate the scope item Project Control – Capital Projects (35F) The processes included in this scope item help our customers to manage Capital Projects, including the link to the Purchase Order processing and settlement into Assets Under Construction (AuC) and Final Assets. 

 

I hope this helps

 

Ernesto Cepeda

entry.content:
Hi Diego,

Thank you for your response. I don't have much experience with SAPUI5 development. How can I create the ValueHelp and then call it from the RAP application? Could you provide more details?

entry.content: google fiori launchpad plugin

entry.title: Re: CRUD with MDF without using Manage Data
entry.content: Hi, Thanks for the answer, but I do know the options you propose. I'm looking for an option similar to position, you can access it through Data Manage or Manage Positions, I'm wondering if I can configure my new MDF, with its own manage data, so I wouldn't have access to other MDF objects.

entry.title: Re: Excel formula to SQL formula for query
entry.content: Doesn't (recent versions of) Abap SQL handle a CEIL( sql_exp ) function?

entry.title: MD04 Rescheduling and Availability check
entry.content:
Hi,

The case is following. In MD04 I have Sales order and Purchasing order.

1. Sales order - date is 01.05.2024

Purchasing order - date is 31.08.204. But Rescheduling date is 01.05.2024 (exception 10).

It is clear, since system reschedule Purchase order to cover requirement of Sales order.

2. ATP check (CO09) for Sales order shows availability date 01.05.2024 (based on rescheduling date). 

The problem is that I still need availability date 31.08.2024 (NOT rescheduling date).

>>> So I need to de-activate rescheduling function for the Material. Therefore, in OMDW I have created new Material Group with Rescheduling horizont = 0. Both Tolerance are also = 0. Then I assigned Material group to Material Master. But it does not help, because rescheduling still happens, even for new orders.

Are there any configurations which could help? I do not touch OPPQ for Plant since consider, that MRP Group has higher priority.

entry.title: Display absence quotas in ESS by creating time-type to combine several quotas in one line
entry.content:
Hi All,

In my company we have several absence quota types in our SAP PT as below:

  1. Vacation Quota
  2. Saved Vacation Quota-1
  3. Saved Vacation Quota-2
  4. Saved Vacation Quota-3
  5. Saved Vacation Quota-4
  6. Saved Vacation Quota-6

I need to display absence quotas in ESS, but we are facing an issue of how can we display the quota #1 in one line and combine the other quotas to be displayed in ESS in one other line noting that the line of combined quotas should display the summation of quotas’ days.

Can you please guide me how can we can create the time type and steps to combine the above mentioned quotas to be displayed

Thank you!

entry.title: Error while subscribing to 'Space' service in BTP trial account
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

 

I am trying to create space in my BTP trial account. When I hit on 'Save' button, I get the following error:

"We could not save your changes. You've entered an invalid value for the quota amount. This can happen if you are trying to increase the quota when it has already been reached, or you are trying to remove quota that is currently in use. Make sure the quota you want to add or remove is available or no longer in use, and then try again."

entry.title: Re: Wily Introscope offline no matter what :-(
entry.content:
Dear Vera,

I had a look at the defaultTrace logs. They are flooded with this error message:

However, there is no problem to access the port on OS level:

Please explain

entry.title: Re: RAP: How to access child information while being on p...
entry.content:
Thanks for your answer Andre!

The reason why I would not like to use the Draft feature is because I do not want to persist the buffer data nor to have the need of creating an additional DB table.

My buffer class is written on the same class where I have my behavior implementation and it just has a table with the 3 fields I need (ID of parent, a flag for marking that certain child is needed and another flag for confirming that the child is present). I append an entry when creating the father and mark the second flag upon the creation of the child. Finally, I check on the check_before_save that for each registry on the buffer table, both flags are marked, if not, raise an error and do not save.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics cloud: table filters disappear when removing/moving a page
entry.content: Please report this to SAP if you can, thanks!

entry.title: Re: How to search for only one property in Object Table o...

entry.title: Re: Calculating Working days between 2 dates SAP SAC
entry.content:
So you want to calculate working days and exclude week-end.

  • How are defined your available factory calendar(s)
  • Look at Fm such as HR_99S_INTERVAL_BETWEEN_DATES, DATE_CHECK_WORKINGDAY, HOLIDAY_GET or DAY_ATTRIBUTES_GET

entry.content:
Hello All,

We need one help on adding Korean language in SAP MII. Currently Korean language not showing in MII  15.1 portal. How to add / enable it and also how to add it in bundle properties creation?

Thanks,

Senthil

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer News, May 30th, 2024
entry.content:
Hi @qmacro very informative post thanks for sharing…

Thanks-

entry.title: Can a custom event trigger a process in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
TLDR; No. Only predefined events can trigger a process in SAP Build Process Automation.

My last interactions with SAP Build Process Automation revolve around how you can trigger process by using events. We know that when configuring a process, one of the triggers can be set to start it is an event - Create an event to start a process. At the moment, the UI only lets you select the events from a dropdown. This is limited to some predefined business events.

By looking under the hood (Web browser, developer tools) I noticed that when setting an event trigger, there is an HTTP request made to the API. This request contains a payload with the following structure:

{
    "name": "MyCustomEventName",
    "identifier": "mycustomeventname",
    "description": "",
    "header": {
        "triggerableArtifactUids": [
            "$.436i6204-0818-3t8o-q0if-h55t46k016gh"
        ],
        "sourceArtifactUid": "sap.s4.beh.businesspartner.v1.BusinessPartner.Created.v1"
    }
}

The sourceArtifactUid field is set to sap.s4.beh.businesspartner.v1.BusinessPartner.Created.v1. This is the event that triggers the process. I've seen this value before when dealing with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Business Partner events.... this is the value set in the type field of the event payload. Remember that SAP has embraced the CloudEvents specification and the type field will be included in the header (context) part of the event message. This got me wondering, what would happen if I set a different value in the sourceArtifactUid field in the request? Will it accept it as a trigger? Let's try it.

{
    "name": "MyCustomEventName",
    "identifier": "mycustomeventname",
    "description": "",
    "header": {
        "triggerableArtifactUids": [
            "$.436i6204-0818-3t8o-q0if-h55t46k016gh"
        ],
        "sourceArtifactUid": "my.custom.event.v1"
    }
}

Will it work? Unfortunately, no. The service validates the value set as sourceArtifactUid. If it doesn't match any of the predefined values, it will not accept it. This is a good thing, as it prevents you from setting a trigger that doesn't exist. That said, it would be nice to have the ability to handle custom events that can trigger processes. I imagine that the custom event will need to follow the CloudEvents specification, but that wouldn't be a big problem. It will be great to have this type of functionality as it would allow for more flexibility and automation in the platform, e.g. events from custom applications.

First published at: https://ajmaradiaga.com/Custom-event-trigger-SBPA/

entry.title: Re: "Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA" as a new SAP CodeJam topic
entry.content: Excellent. Let's try to create one of these events during SAP Inside Track PORTO ?  It will be great!

entry.title: Re: (How-to) Share your experiences and stories with the SAP Signavio Community

Looking forward to hearing our customer's stories and different perspectives and reading more blog posts!

Thanks for the tips! 😊

entry.title: Re: Get Limited Screen While Scanning Bar Code
entry.content: You can use the OnValueChange event on the simple property form cell to get the value and adjust as needed.

entry.title: How to make a request for DB recovery in SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
If we need a SAP HANA Cloud DB recovery, we would like to know what is the procedure required to request recovery.
I'm inquiring about the work plan to be done in case of a recovery situation

1. Contact Point ( Only Incident? )
2. How to make a request for DB recovery.
3. It's usually an emergency, but how fast is it handled?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to make a request for DB recovery in SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

If no Datalake is attached, recovery can be done via SAP HANA Cloud Central:

Managing SAP HANA Database Instances | SAP Help Portal

It’s available for all HANA versions. Please note that multi-environment tools has to be enabled (3303080 - How to enable Multi-Environment SAP HANA Cloud Tools (HANA Cloud Central) - SAP for Me).

This is explained in KBA:

3466792 - Recovery of SAP HANA Cloud Instance request to SAP Technical Support - SAP for Me

See also:

  • SAP HANA Cloud Administration Guide for more information about Backups and Recovery.
  • 3280211 - How to recovery HANA Cloud instance? - SAP for Me

Best Regards,

Technical Support

entry.title: Enhancing Quote-to-Order for E2E Lot Size-of-One E2E scenario
entry.content:
In the past release, the user story of Lot Size-of-One (Make-to-Order) End-to-End scenario started with direct Sales Order creation, while dealing with Configurable Material. To strengthen the Quote-to-Order business process for the Make-to-Order scenario with Configurable Material (AVC), there has been an extension to the story line by starting from Inquiry, Quotation and Sales Order creation in reference to the Quotation number generated. 

As Sales representative, when a customer enquires about a product with customizing request, the Make-to-Order scenario can start with Inquiry initiation via Manage Sales Inquiries Fiori app.

Inquiry creation

Material and customizing

Inquiry created

Now as the Inquiry is generated. Based on this Sales Representative can proceed to create Quotation using Fiori app Manage Sales Quotations

Creation of QuotationReview Availability Check Result confirming on timelines and quantity

Quotation is generation

The Sales Representative has Inquiry and Quotation created. The next step is creation of Sales Order via VA01. The Sales Order can be created with reference to the Quotation number, which reduces the effort of re-entering the material customizing and cost calculations.

Sales Order created with reference

With the above steps Quote-to-Order process is complete. Next, the MRP runs can be scheduled to evaluate the material deficit and Purchase Requisitions can be generated accordingly.

Please refer to SCN Blog - Working with E2E Lot Size of One (CTO scenario) wi... - SAP Community to complete the Order-to-Cash process flow.

entry.title: Re: CRUD with MDF without using Manage Data
entry.content: Try exploring the option to control the access to the Objects via RBP. So with this you should be able to restrict the objects that you see and not the other objects.

entry.title: Re: Availability check Stock in delivery from STO
entry.content:
Hello @VictorPatricio 

That can be achieved with a custom enhancement in VL01*. See the note 198137 - VL10: User exits / customer-specific enhancements for details.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Here is Your Top Ten Sessions Agenda at SAPPHIRE Orlando for Supply Chain Planners!
entry.content: @vincentverheyen Sapphire Orlando is a physical event only. However, you can register for SAP Sapphire Virtual in 2024 | SAP Events and watch 3 top Planning sessions from Orlando: SCM106 - IBP roadmap, SCM137 - discussion with customer Organon on SAP IBP & Business AI, SCM166 - discussion with Google on Business AI.
